ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight #12345
ham.body:
Hello Arjun,

Thank you for booking with Air India. Yahan aapke flight ke details hain:

• Flight Number: AI 102
• Departure: New Delhi (DEL) – 12:15 PM, 20 Oct 2024
• Arrival: Mumbai (BOM) – 3:55 PM, 20 Oct 2024
• Seat: 12B (Window)
• Baggage: 1 checked bag (23 kg) + 1 carry‑on
• Ticket Class: Business

Please find the attached itinerary and boarding pass. Agar aapko koi changes karne hain, to hamare customer care se 1800-123-456 par call karein ya neeche ke button par click karein.

Thank you for choosing Air India. Wishing you a pleasant journey!

Best regards,
Air India Reservations Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear Priya,

Aapke Microsoft 365 account ke password 48 ghante mein expire ho jayega. Kripya turant reset karein, varna aapko access khone ka khatra hai.

Password reset karne ke liye yahan click karein:

<URL>

Agar aap 48 ghante ke andar action nahi liya, to aapka account lock ho jayega aur aap important documents nahi dekh paayenge.

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Regards,
Microsoft Security Team
